name: Tuscan Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup dry white wine (or use more dressing)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, shallow baking dish or plastic bag, combine the Italian dressing, white wine, and sage.
2. Add the pork chops to the marinade. Turn the chops to coat them evenly with the marinade.
3. Cover or seal the bag/dish. Refrigerate for 3 to 24 hours, turning occasionally.
4. Remove the pork chops from the marinade, reserving the liquid.
5. Grill or broil the chops, turning once, until they are cooked through.
6. In a saucepan over medium heat, bring the reserved marinade to a boil. Continue boiling for at least 2 minutes.
7. Remove the pan from the heat and add the butter. Stir until the butter melts.
